ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "agency_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "agency_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  "agency_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_types" (
  "bid_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid type */,
  "bid_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bid type */,
  "bid_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the bid type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_categories" (
  "naics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NAICS category */,
  "naics_code" TEXT /* NAICS code */,
  "naics_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the NAICS category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency posting the bid */,
  "bid_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of bid (e.g., Federal Prebids, Federal Bids) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the bid */,
  "naics_id" INTEGER /* NAICS category code for the bid */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bid (e.g., open, closed, awarded) */,
  "bid_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the bid */,
  "bid_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements or specifications for the bid */,
  "bid_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the bid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_bid_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_type_id") REFERENCES bid_types ("bid_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_naics_id FOREIGN KEY ("naics_id") REFERENCES naics_categories ("naics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contractors" (
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contractor */,
  "contractor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contractor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the contractor */,
  "contractor_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contractor */,
  "contractor_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contractor */,
  "contractor_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the contractor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid being applied for */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contractor applying */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_applications_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES contractors ("contractor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_applications_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contractor, agency administrator, procurement official) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_documents_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user posting the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_comments_comment_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_reply_id") REFERENCES bid_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_comments_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id")
)
